properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v4 v3 v1 v5 v1 v3 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It’s gonna be better than Better than Better than I could dream

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Your goodness can’t be stopped Your love is better than I ever thought Your mercy saved my soul Your kindness came down to make me whole

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I prophesy into tomorrow We will see the goodness of our God

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: One seed can move a mountain One yes can change it all One moment in Your presence That’s all I ever want

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You turn ashes into beauty Mourning into joy That’s who You are God That’s who You are You can move the tallest mountain With the smallest seed That’s what You do God That’s what You do
